channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Pentagon-FAA dispute over lasers to thwart cartel drones led to airspace closure, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

item.title: FBI combs through thick desert terrain in search for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigations
